reference: Hello, I am about eight weeks pregnant and for the last two days I have been seeing brown discharge when I wipe after using the bathroom. Today, I have experienced two period-like cramps. I do not have tender breasts or really any other symptoms. I called the doctor, but they seemed as if they did not care. I am getting worried it may be a miscarriage.
text: Hello, I am about 8 weeks pregnant, and for the last 2 days I have been seeing brown discharge when I wipe after using the bathroom. Today I have experienced 2 period-like cramps. I don't have tender breasts, or really any other symptoms. I called the doctor, but they seemed as if they did not care. I am getting worried it may be a miscarriage.
